response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, extensive experience in developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, DLang libraries), and clear leadership through workshops and open-source projects, but lacks explicit evidence of people management, organizational change leadership, or mobile platform expertise — key requirements for this role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools and test infrastructure (Trial, Fluent-Asserts, CI/CD setups)
Proven track record of technical leadership via workshops, open-source projects, and cross-team knowledge sharing
Broad technical stack across mobile, web, and systems programming with demonstrated problem-solving in high-scale environments
concerns: No clear evidence of formal people management or team leadership beyond technical mentorship
Limited direct experience with mobile platform ecosystems (iOS/Android) despite relevant project exposure
Absence of documented experience leading organizational change or strategic roadmap ownership at scale
